mission.title: kubernetes: Support M1 MacBooks darwin/arm64 on the client-side
mission.description:
Please test using:
```
build/run.sh make generated_files && make quick-release-images
```

Signed-off-by: Davanum Srinivas <davanum@gmail.com>

**What type of PR is this?**

/kind feature

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:

Fixes #97550

**Special notes for your reviewer**:

```release-note
Add support to generate client-side binaries for new darwin/arm64 platform
```
